title: townsendia mensana
intro: Townsendia mensana, also known as Mountain Sunflower or Greenstem Mountain Sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Townsendia mensana can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, allowing for different herbal preparations to cater to individual needs.
